title: The Bombay High Court's latest circular is a band-aid on backlog
description: By a circular dated April 23, the Registrar General of the Bombay High Court directed all judicial officers to list twice a month all “maintenance cases” and “recovery proceedings” filed under the Protection of Women from Domestic Violence Act, 2005 (DV Act), Section 144 of the Bhartiya Nagrik Suraksha Sanhita, 2023 (BNSS), etc and to ensure that no frequent/casual adjournments are granted in such matters unless exceptional circumstances warrant an adjournment.The said direction has been issued
